methodology: Age-based classification on open issues. 700 of 807 open issues sampled (86.7%), remaining estimated.

notes: High closure rate (251 closed in 30 days) indicates active maintenance
108 issues marked 'inactive' — consider closing or following up
3 P1 issues open including 1 critical security advisory (GHSA-qmgw-45x4-3626) — now 66 days old

age_distribution.methodology: Calculated from 700 most recently updated open issues + extrapolation for remaining 107

active_0_7d.description: Recently created or updated, likely actively being worked

aging_8_30d.description: A few weeks old without recent update

stale_31_90d.description: 1–3 months old with no recent activity — needs triage

zombie_over_90d.description: Over 3 months old — potential candidates for closure

bug_health.concern: P1 security advisory #12966 has been open 66 days with no resolution

no_label_issues.action: Triage needed — add at minimum bug/feature/question labels

inactive_issues.description: Issues labeled 'inactive' — no response from author or stalled
inactive_issues.recommendation: Consider auto-closing after 14 more days of inactivity

p1_critical.action_required: Security advisory GHSA-qmgw-45x4-3626 (#12966) requires immediate triage response

recommendations.action: Respond to security advisory GHSA-qmgw-45x4-3626 on issue #12966 immediately (66 days unaddressed)
Triage 106 unlabeled issues — add at minimum bug/feature/question labels
Investigate 'Blocked: v2' issues (62 in sample) — coordinate resolution timeline with v2 roadmap
Address P1 issues #13608 (mimo streaming) and #13193 (Azure OpenAI regression)
